title: MikroTik RouterBOARD L41G-2axD, hAP ax lite
description: hAP ax lite is the perfect small solution, with low acquisition costs and high performance requirements. The device is equipped with a dual-core IPQ-5010 CPU clocked at 800 MHz, 256 MB RAM, 128 MB storage, 4x Gigabit LAN and the latest dual channel WiFi 6 with support for 802.11b/g/n/ax standards only in the 2.4 GHz spectrum . The Gen6 AX wireless chip lets you squeeze traditional 2.4GHz wireless spectrum like a lemon!
